prTitle: feat: build session UI components for gym session tracking
prBody:
## Summary

- **`SessionViewModel`** — `@Observable @MainActor` state machine (`idle → active → paused → complete / abandoned`) with `Timer.publish` elapsed timer, configurable rest timer (default 90 s), and inline PR detection (new weight > previous best). Persists `WorkoutSession` and `LoggedSet` records via `WorkoutRepository`; writes a HealthKit workout on finish.
- **`ActiveSessionView`** — full-screen session screen with a live header (elapsed time, volume, PR count), per-exercise set-logging cards, `RestTimerView` banner that slides in between sets, toolbar actions for abandon/timer settings, and navigation to `SessionSummaryView` on finish.
- **`ExerciseSetRow`** — editable weight / reps / RPE row with previous-best inline reference, completion checkbox, and a trophy PR badge.
- **`RestTimerView`** — animated circular progress ring countdown with skip button.
- **`RestTimerSettingsView`** — sheet for choosing from 30 s – 5 min rest presets.
- **`SessionSummaryView`** — post-session summary with duration, total volume, PR banner, and per-exercise set breakdown.
- **`SessionViewModelTests`** — 20 unit tests covering state transitions, PR detection logic, volume accumulation, rest timer, and repository error handling.

Closes #61
